meta.description: Django + MySQL movie app with TMDB dataset, user auth, watchlist, and platform tracking
meta.stack: Django 4.2, MySQL 8, Python 3.11, TMDB local CSV dataset

tasks.title: Install dependencies & setup virtual environment
tasks.description: Set up Python virtual environment and install all required packages
steps: Open terminal in project root: cd screenz
tasks.notes: Always activate venv before running any Django commands

tasks.title: Configure MySQL database
tasks.description: Create MySQL database and configure Django to connect to it
steps: Open MySQL Workbench or CMD mysql -u root -p
Run: CREATE DATABASE screenz_db CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
Create a MySQL user: CREATE USER 'screenz_user'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'your_password';
Grant permissions: GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON screenz_db.* TO 'screenz_user'@'localhost';
Update .env file with your DB credentials
tasks.notes: Change DB_PASSWORD in .env to your actual MySQL root password

tasks.title: Download TMDB dataset & import movies
tasks.description: Download TMDB 1M movie dataset from Kaggle and import into MySQL
steps: Place tmdb_movies.csv in the /data/ folder of the project
Check admin panel to confirm import
tasks.notes: Use --limit flag to import a subset first to test (50k is a good start). Full 1M may take 10-15 mins.

tasks.title: User authentication system
tasks.description: Login, signup, logout with Django auth + custom user profile
tasks.notes: CustomUser model extends AbstractUser with avatar and bio fields

tasks.title: Movie models & database schema
tasks.description: Create all Django models: Movie, Genre, Platform, StreamingAvailability
tasks.notes: Movie model includes title, overview, release_date, vote_average, genres (M2M), platforms (M2M)

tasks.title: Home page — trending & newly added
tasks.description: Build home page showing trending movies, newly added, and genre filters
tasks.notes: Home page uses HTMX for filter updates without full page reload

tasks.title: Search & filter system
tasks.description: Full-text search with genre, year, platform, and type filters
tasks.notes: Uses Django Q objects for combined filtering. HTMX for live search.

tasks.title: Movie detail page
tasks.description: Individual movie page with overview, cast, platforms, and watchlist button
steps: Click any movie card to test
tasks.notes: Shows which platform to watch on (Netflix, Prime, Jio, Hotstar, Apple TV+)

tasks.title: Watchlist & watched history
tasks.description: Add/remove movies from watchlist, mark as watched, personal tracking
tasks.notes: WatchlistItem model: user + movie + status (want_to_watch / watched) + added_at

tasks.title: User profile page
tasks.description: Profile page showing stats, watched movies, and watchlist
tasks.notes: Shows: movies watched, watchlist size, favorite genres (auto-calculated)

tasks.title: Platform streaming info
tasks.description: Tag movies with which platform they are on (Netflix, Prime, Jio, Hotstar)
steps: Go to admin and assign platforms to movies
Verify platform badges appear on movie cards
tasks.notes: Platforms: Netflix, Amazon Prime, JioCinema, Hotstar/Disney+, Apple TV+

tasks.title: REST API endpoints
tasks.description: JSON API for movies, search, watchlist — used by JS frontend
tasks.notes: Uses Django REST Framework. Returns paginated JSON responses.

tasks.title: UI styling — dark cinema theme
tasks.description: Apply the dark red/black SCREENZ theme across all pages
steps: Verify movie cards, search, profile all match theme
tasks.notes: Theme: bg #0a0a0f, accent #E5383B, surface #12121a. Uses Google Fonts: Bebas Neue + DM Sans

tasks.title: Testing & production prep
tasks.description: Basic tests and prepare for deployment
tasks.notes: For deployment on Windows: consider PythonAnywhere or Railway.app (free tier)
